DO NOT SCALE DRAWINGS CONTRACTOR TO
VERIFY ALL EXISTING CONDITIONS AND
DIMENSIONS-NOTIFY ARCHITECT OF ANY
DISCREPANCIES PRIOR TO BEGINNING
CONSTRUCTION
PROJECT NAME:
DHC MIDLOTHIAN
MIDLOTHIAN TURNPIKE & ALVERSER DRIVE
MIDLOTHIAN, VA 23223
GENERAL NOTES
1. ALL GREASE EXHAUST DUCTWORK SHALL BE DOUBLE-WALL FACTORY BUILT GREASE DUCT FOR USE WITH
TYPE I KITCHEN HOOD THAT CONFORMS TO THE REQUIREMENTS OF NFPA-96. PRODUCT SHALL BEETL BE ETL
LISTED TO UL-1978 & UL-2221.
2. ANY CHANGES MADE TO THE DESIGN IDENTIFIED ON THESE DRAWINGS AND/OR ASSOCIATED SPECIFICATIONS
SHALL BE SUBMITTED TO THE ENGINEER/ARCHITECT OF RECORD FOR REVIEW AND APPROVAL PRIOR TO
MAKING ANY MODIFICATIONS TO THE PROJECT. ANY LIABILITY AS A RESULT OF DESIGN MODIFICATIONS, AS
WELL AS ANY COST ASSOCIATED WITH SUCH MODIFICATIONS, MADE WITHOUT THE WRITTEN APPROVAL OF
THE ENGINEER/ARCHITECT OF RECORD SHALL BECOME THE RESPONSIBILITY OF THE CONTRACTOR.
3. PROVIDE MANUAL VOLUME DAMPERS AT ALL BRANCH DUCTS. PROVIDE CABLE/ ELECTRONIC VOLUME
DAMPERS AT ALL IN-ACCESSABLE CEILING LOCATIONS,
4. DUCT DIMENSIONS ON PLAN ARE SHEET METAL SIZE.
5. ALL CEILING DIFFUSER AND RETURN AIR REGISTER CEILING BOXES SHALL BE OF SUFFICIENT HEIGHT TO
PERMIT SIDE INLET DUCT CONNECTIONS WHEN ATTACHED TO BRANCH DUCTS, OR FULL SIZE VERTICAL
PLENUMS WHEN CONNECTED DIRECTLY OFF BOTTOM OF SA OR RA MAINS. SUCH CEILING BOXES AND
VERTICAL PLENUMS SHALL BE LINED W/ 1" THICK NFBU RATED DUCT LINER WITH FLAT BLACK FACING.
CONNECTION TO SIDEWALL SUPPLY REGISTERS SHALL BE MADE WITH FULL SIZE HORIZONTAL PLENUM
EXTENSIONS FROM MAIN SUPPLY DUCT, LINED OR WRAPPED AT CONTRACTORS OPTION
LA
6. CONTRACTOR TO PROVIDE ALL CONTROL ACCESSORIES AND COORDINATE WITH ALL TRADES AND PROVIDE
MINIMUM CLEARANCE FOR ALL EQUIPMENT.
7. CONTRACTOR TO VERIFY ALL EXISTING CONDITIONS BEFORE START OF ANY WORK.
8. CONTRACTOR TO PROVIDE NECESSARY CONTROL DEVICES TO ENSURE THE SYSTEM FUNCTIONS PROPERLY.
9. FACTORY BUILT GREASE DUCT SHALL BE PROVIDED BY KEC AND INSTALLED BY MECHANICAL CONTRACTOR.
10. IF EXISTING DUCTWORK IS REUSED, CONTRACTOR SHALL INCLUDE PRICING TO PROFESSIONALLY CLEAN THE
DUCT SYSTEM AS PART OF THEIR BASE BID.
11. HOOD HAS MINIMUM OF 6" OVERHANG ALL AROUND COOKING EQUIPMENT.
12. PROVIDE CLEAR THERMOSTAT LOCKABLE BOX.
13. REMOTE TEST INDICATORS (RTI) FOR SMOKE DETECTOR. LABEL CLEARLY MATCHING THE UNIT ITS BEING
SERVED NEXT TO ITS THERMOSTAT.
118 STAINLESS STEEL DOUBLE WALL FACTORY BUILT GREASE DUCT INTO HOOD (2,800 CFM 1,584
FPM)
2 STAINLESS STEEL DOUBLE-WALL FACTORY BUILT GREASE DUCT. THE SLOPE OF THE HORIZONTAL DUCT
SHALL NOT BE LESS THAN THE MANUFACTURER'S INSTALLATION INSTRUCTION (SLOPE SHALL BE 1/16"
PER LINEAR FOOT FOR HORIZONTAL DUCT RUN LESS THAN 75', AND 3/16" PER LINEAR FOOT FOR
HORIZONTAL DUCT RUN MORE THAN 75: PER CAPTIVEAIRE DOUBLE WALL GREASE EXHAUST AIR DUCT
INSTALLATION INSTRUCTION) TOWARD THE HOOD OR TOWARD THE APPROVED GREASE RESERVOIR.
3 CLEAN-OUT ACCESS DOORS AT EVERY 12-0" O.C. AND AT EACH CHANGE OF DIRECTION FOR ALL
HORIZONTAL GREASE DUCT.
4 180 STAINLESS STEEL DOUBLE WALL FACTORY BUILT GREASE DUCT UP TO ROOF (2,800 CFM 1,584
FPM) SEE M3.0 FOR CONTINUATION.
SUPPLY AND RETURN AIR DUCT AND UP TO RTU-1 SEE M3.0 FOR CONTINUATION.
6 SUPPLY AND RETURN AIR DUCT AND UP TO DOAS-1 SEE M3.0 FOR CONTINUATION.
7 4 RESTROOM EXHAUST AIR DUCT UP TO ROOF TERMINATE WITH FACTORY ROOF CAP (80 CFM) - SEE
M3.0 FOR CONTINUATION.
8 NO DUCTS AND PIPING TO RUN ABOVE ELECTRICAL PANELS AND TRANSFORMERS PER NEC
REQUIREMENTS, SEE CONSTRICTION NOTE #42 ON M1.0.
9 PROVIDE REMOTE TEST INDICATORS (RTI) FOR SMOKE DETECTOR NEXT TO ITS THERMOSTAT. LABEL
CLEARLY MATCHING THE UNIT ITS BEING SERVED.
10 THERMOSTAT SHALL BE HONEYWELL T10+. THERMOSTAT SHALL BE PRE-SET AT 72°F AND THE AC SHALL
OPERATE FROM 10AM TO 12AM. PROVIDE WITH CLEAR PLASTIC THERMOSTAT COVER.
11 ALL EXPOSED DUCT IN DINING AREA SHALL BE PAINTED PER ARCHITECTURE DRAWINGS.
